case_title: KAPRIELIAN, HRANTOUHI vs. KONE, MONTGOMERY et al

docket_entries.description: STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JAN-28-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON JAN-28-1997, OSC WHY SANCTIONS SHOULD NOT BE IMPOSED ON PLAINTIFF FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AND COMPLY WITH COURT RULES HEARING SET FOR FEB-27-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.

GENERAL NEGLIGENCE, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KAPRIELIAN, HRANTOUHI AS TO DEFENDANT KONE, MONTGOMERY MT. ZION MEDICAL CENTER DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JAN-28-1997 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-02-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JAN-08-1997
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

OSC CALENDAR OF FEB-27-1997, CONTINUED TO APR-08-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR PLTF TO FILE DISMISSAL. OSC FROM 1-28-97 IS CONTINUED FOR PLTF'S FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE STAT CONF 2-27-97 AND FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH COURT RULES AND FOR PLTF TO SHOW CAUSE WHY CASE SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF APR-08-1997, DISMISSAL FOR PLTF'S FAILURE TO APPEAR AT 2 OSC. DISMISSAL IS PURSUANT TO CCP 575.2 AND THE CASE OF CA CASUALTY INDEMNITY VS MENDOZA (1995) 36 CA 4TH 678.
